focus: Repair and enforce the local traceability chain across mission updates, evaluation timeline, search evolution, architecture timeline, decisions, and experiment artifacts.
reason_started: The operator asked why mission updates did not keep architecture and evaluation evolution tightly aligned and asked to fix this before continuing the journey.
reason_ended: Mission updates, evaluation timeline, search evolution, architecture timeline, traceability registry, generation records, and validation checks now align through GEN-015.
traceability_rules_added: Metric-moving experiments must update the mission update, evaluation timeline, search evolution entry, architecture timeline/version, decision ledger, traceability registry, generation summary, and experiment README.
Released architectures receive Git tags; candidate-only experiments keep Git tag as not assigned until promotion.

validators_executed.name: npm run validate
validators_executed.evidence: 30 node tests passed; MDE parser checked 63 files; traceability validator checked 19 files and IDs through GEN-015/prf-rerank; fixture index and evaluation checks passed.

validators_executed.name: traceability stale-current-best scan
validators_executed.evidence: Docs consistently identify prf-rerank as current best and keep candidate Git tags unassigned until promotion.

validators_skipped.name: Cloudflare deploy verification
validators_skipped.reason: GEN-015 changes local documentation and traceability artifacts only.

validators_skipped.name: Live OpenSearch re-evaluation
validators_skipped.reason: GEN-015 did not change retrieval behavior and records existing GEN-013/GEN-014 live evidence.

evidence_quality_notes: GEN-015 is a traceability repair and does not change public/default search behavior.
